mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_penalty (report_id, username, penalty_type, starts_at, ends_at, active) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{username}, #{penaltyType}, #{startsAt}, #{endsAt}, #{active})
mapper.select: SELECT id, report_id, username, penalty_type, starts_at, ends_at, active FROM user_penalty WHERE username = #{username} AND active = 'Y' AND (ends_at IS NULL OR ends_at >= #{now}) ORDER BY starts_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_penalty SET active = 'N' WHERE active = 'Y' AND ends_at IS NOT NULL AND ends_at < #{now}
